title: AI Command Console Setup Guide - CIA Style Geospatial Dashboard
summary: Browser-based AI-powered geospatial dashboard for real-time tracking and monitoring

steps: Create Frontend: Vercel + Next.js template or Replit
Add Map Layer: Mapbox or Google Maps API with satellite tiles

method_2_full_dev.frontend: Next.js + Mapbox GL + WebSocket for real-time updates
method_2_full_dev.backend: Node.js or FastAPI - Pull aircraft + traffic feeds, Stream via WebSocket
method_2_full_dev.optional: Add YOLO or OpenCV for real object detection
method_2_full_dev.cost: Server: $10-25/month, API keys: Pay per usage

how_it_works: Frontend renders movement in real time
key_concepts.key_insight: It's not one magic model. It's coordination between models + live data + UI.
